mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CUSTOMER_ID) FROM CORDYS.MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND UAI_ISA_BUY_CURRENT_YEAR_KBN IN('1','2')

SELECT /*+ INDEX(A PKATTENTION_INFO) INDEX(B IND_ATTENTION_CATEGORY_MAST_1) */ B.CATEGORY_CD FROM CALLCENTER.ATTENTION_INFO A ,CALLCENTER.ATTENTION_CATEGORY_MASTER B WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND A.CATEGORY = B.CATEGORY_NAME(+) AND A.ON_OFF_FLG = '有効'
